backend/main.mo: Motoko actor that tracks total page views and unique visitors using a counter and a Set, exposing query and update methods for reading and incrementing both metrics.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report documenting a single high-confidence feature: reverting the entire project (frontend and backend) to its exact Version 9 state, listing all affected files and components.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: JSON map of frontend source file paths to short descriptions summarizing each file's purpose and key implementation details for build planning reference.
frontend/index.css: Global stylesheet that imports Tailwind directives and defines CSS custom properties for light and dark theme design tokens (colors, radius, sidebar, charts).
frontend/index.html: Minimal HTML entry point for the React app, mounting the app into a #root div and loading the main TypeScript module.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root application file that configures TanStack Router with all public and admin routes, wraps the app in CMS/Auth/Query providers, and initializes page view and unique visitor trackers.
frontend/src/components/admin/AboutPageE: Admin form for editing the About page content including biography, artist statement, portrait image upload, career milestones, and press links.
frontend/src/components/admin/AdminLayou: Admin shell layout with a responsive sidebar navigation (desktop and mobile overlay) containing links to all admin sections and a sign-out button.
frontend/src/components/admin/ArtworkFor: Modal dialog form for creating or editing an artwork entry, handling fields like title, year, medium, availability, and image uploads.
frontend/src/components/admin/BlogPostFo: Modal dialog form for creating or editing a blog post with title, auto-generated slug, content, publish date, and draft/published status.
frontend/src/components/admin/Commission: Admin editor component for the Commissions page that allows editing hero text, pricing text, process steps, and FAQ items with add/remove/update functionality, saving changes via CMSContext.
frontend/src/components/admin/HeroEditor: Admin editor for the homepage hero section, allowing updates to artist name, tagline, intro text, and hero image upload, with changes saved to CMSContext.
frontend/src/components/admin/InquiryRow: Displays a single commission inquiry with name, email, budget, timeline, and description, and allows cycling its status (unread/read/responded) via CMSContext.
Renders a media library tile with image preview, replace/delete controls, and an inline tag management UI backed by CMSContext.
frontend/src/components/admin/Navigation: Admin editor for site navigation items, supporting add/remove/update of label and path fields with save confirmation, persisted through CMSContext.
frontend/src/components/admin/PressEdito: Admin editor for managing press mentions, allowing creation and editing of publication, date, headline, URL, and excerpt fields, saved to CMSContext.
frontend/src/components/admin/Testimonia: Admin UI component for managing testimonials, allowing adding, editing, and removing testimonial entries with quote, name, location, and role fields, then saving them to CMS context.
frontend/src/components/ArtworkCard.tsx: Lazy-loaded artwork card component displaying an image, availability badge, multi-photo count badge, and basic metadata, triggering an onClick callback when clicked.
frontend/src/components/BeforeAfterSlide: Interactive drag-based before/after image comparison slider supporting both mouse and touch events, clipping the 'after' image based on a draggable divider position.
frontend/src/components/CareerTimeline.t: Vertical timeline component that renders a list of career milestones with a gold dot indicator, year label, and event description for each entry.
frontend/src/components/CommissionInquir: A form component for submitting custom commission inquiries with fields for name, email, project type, budget, timeline, and description, including validation and a success state.
frontend/src/components/ContactForm.tsx: A general contact form with name, email, subject, and message fields that validates input and submits inquiries via the CMS context, showing a success screen on completion.
frontend/src/components/FAQAccordion.tsx: An accordion component that renders a list of FAQ items, toggling one open at a time with an animated expand/collapse transition.
frontend/src/components/Footer.tsx: Site footer displaying the brand name, navigation links, social media links, and live page view/unique visitor counters fetched via custom hooks.
frontend/src/components/Header.tsx: Sticky site header with desktop navigation, a 'Commission a Painting' CTA button, and a responsive mobile menu drawer using TanStack Router for navigation.
frontend/src/components/Lightbox.tsx: A fullscreen image lightbox supporting zoom via scroll wheel, keyboard navigation, and multi-photo browsing with dot indicators for artworks that have additional images.
A small presentational component that renders italicized placeholder text to indicate where an artist needs to fill in content.
frontend/src/components/NewsletterSignup: A simple email newsletter signup form that shows a thank-you message upon submission without any backend integration.
frontend/src/components/PlaceholderImage: A lazy-loaded image component that shows a beige placeholder until the element enters the viewport, then renders either an actual image or a colored div.
frontend/src/components/PressMentionCard: Displays a single press mention as a clickable card with publication name, date, headline, excerpt, and an external link icon.
frontend/src/components/TestimonialCarou: An auto-rotating testimonial carousel with previous/next navigation buttons and dot indicators, cycling through an array of testimonials.
Renders a responsive grid of testimonial cards, each showing a quote, author name, and optional location.
frontend/src/contexts/AuthContext.tsx: React context providing simple password-based admin authentication with login/logout functions and localStorage persistence.
frontend/src/contexts/CMSContext.tsx: Central CMS React context defining all content data types (artworks, blog posts, testimonials, inquiries, site settings, etc.) and their CRUD state management for the application.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Custom hook that creates and caches an ICP backend actor using React Query, recreating it when the Internet Identity changes and invalidating dependent queries accordingly.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Custom hook and provider for Internet Computer Internet Identity authentication, managing AuthClient lifecycle, login/logout flow, and exposing identity and status to the component tree.
frontend/src/hooks/useLazyLoad.ts: Custom hook that uses IntersectionObserver to lazily mark a referenced element as visible when it enters the viewport.
frontend/src/hooks/usePageMeta.ts: Custom hook that updates the document title and meta description based on either a known SEO page key from CMS settings or explicit title/description strings.
frontend/src/hooks/usePageViewTracker.ts: Custom hook that increments the backend page view counter once per component mount and returns the current page view count.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: React Query hooks for fetching and mutating page view counts and unique visitor counts via the ICP backend actor.
frontend/src/hooks/useUniqueVisitorTrack: Custom hook that assigns a UUID to new visitors via localStorage and registers them with the backend once, returning the total unique visitor count.
frontend/src/index.css: Global stylesheet importing Google Fonts and defining Tailwind base styles, a custom color palette (beige, charcoal, gold, sage), shadcn CSS tokens, typography scale, and utility animations.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that renders the React app wrapped in QueryClientProvider and InternetIdentityProvider.
frontend/src/pages/About.tsx: About page displaying the artist's portrait, biography, social links, career timeline, and press mentions pulled from CMS context.
frontend/src/pages/admin/AdminLogin.tsx: Renders a password-based admin login form with show/hide toggle, calling the AuthContext login function and displaying an error on failure.
frontend/src/pages/admin/BlogManager.tsx: Admin page for listing, creating, editing, deleting, and toggling publish status of blog posts using CMSContext and a BlogPostForm component.
frontend/src/pages/admin/CommissionsMana: Displays commission inquiries from CMSContext with filterable tabs (all/unread/responded) and an unread count badge, rendering each inquiry via InquiryRow.
frontend/src/pages/admin/Dashboard.tsx: Admin dashboard showing stat cards (artworks, categories, unread inquiries, featured works) and quick-action buttons for navigating to key admin sections.
Admin page for managing artworks with a sortable table supporting add, edit, delete, feature toggle, and visibility toggle via CMSContext and ArtworkForm.
frontend/src/pages/admin/MediaLibrary.ts: Admin media library page that supports image uploads, search by filename or tag, and displays results in a responsive grid using MediaTile components.
frontend/src/pages/admin/MessagesInbox.t: Empty file with no implemented content.
frontend/src/pages/admin/PagesEditor.tsx: Tabbed admin editor for site page sections (hero, navigation, about, commissions, testimonials, press), rendering the appropriate editor component per active tab.
frontend/src/pages/admin/Settings.tsx: Admin settings page component that allows editing site-wide configuration including general info, social media links, SEO metadata per page, and saving changes via CMSContext.
frontend/src/pages/Commissions.tsx: Commissions page showing a hero, process steps, pricing, portfolio examples, before/after slider, FAQ accordion, and an inquiry form from CMS data.
frontend/src/pages/Contact.tsx: Contact page with a message form, studio location, map placeholder, and social media links sourced from CMS site settings.
frontend/src/pages/Gallery.tsx: Gallery page that displays filterable artwork cards by category with a lightbox for full-size viewing.
frontend/src/pages/Home.tsx: Home page featuring a full-screen hero, featured artworks grid, testimonial carousel, newsletter signup, and a map pins section using CMS data.
frontend/src/pages/Testimonials.tsx: Testimonials page showing client reviews in either carousel or grid view, plus a press mentions section, all sourced from CMS context.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration defining custom fonts (Cormorant Garamond, Lato), a warm beige/charcoal/gold color palette using oklch values, and extended theme tokens for shadows, border radius, and sidebar/chart colors.
project_state.json: Project state snapshot (version 23) documenting the art portfolio site's architecture, existing features, known issues (placeholder image styling, admin sidebar text visibility), and tech stack (React, TypeScript, Tailwind, Context API CMS).
